history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, head-and-shoulders shot of a young East Asian woman lying on a bed, with her face turned towards the camera. She has long, dark, slightly messy hair with subtle blue streaks, framing her face. Her eyes are a warm brown, and she has a soft, natural makeup look with defined eyebrows and light lip color. Her right hand is gently touching her lips, with her fingers poised near her mouth. She is wearing a simple white t-shirt. The lighting is soft and moody, with a cool blueish tone, suggesting it might be evening or artificial indoor lighting. The background consists of dark grey walls and beige curtains, creating a cozy and intimate atmosphere. The overall mood is relaxed, contemplative, and slightly alluring. The image has a slightly grainy, high-quality, photographic aesthetic, possibly with a touch of a dreamy or ethereal feel.
